seo.title: Powerton Engineering - Sarrafa Masana'antu da Paneli na Sarrafa | Indiya
seo.description: Babban masana'anta na paneli na sarrafa wutar lantarki, tsarin sarrafa masana'antu da kuma hanyoyin kayan aiki. Sabis na injiniya na musamman a duk faɗin Indiya tare da gogewa fiye da shekaru 15.

hero.subtitle: Fadin tarihin kayayyakinmu da sabis sun bayar da cikakkun maganganun da ke tafiyar da nasarar masana'antu, suna tabbatar da an rufe kowane bangare na bukatun injiniyarku.

mechanical.title: Pamfuna na Inji
mechanical.description: Maganganun pamfuna mai ɗorewa da kayan gyara

tools.title: Kayan Aikin Masana'antu
tools.description: Kayan aiki masu inganci na ƙwararru

about.visualDescription: Injiniyoyin Indiya na ƙwararru da ke aiki akan tsarin sarrafa masana'antu da na'urorin sarrafa
about.label: Game da Mu
about.title: Maraba da Powerton Engineering Pvt. Ltd.
about.description: Abokinkaku da ake dogara da shi wajen ba da ingantattun maganganun injiniya da sabis. An kafa mu da hangen nesa na ƙarfafa masana'antu ta hanyar kirkire-kirkire da nagarta, mun ƙware wajen samar da cikakkun kayayyakin lantarki da kayan aiki.

services.label: Sabisanmu
services.title: Cikakkun Maganganun Injiniya
services.description: Daga sarrafa har zuwa kayan aiki, muna ba da cikakkun maganganun injiniya da ke tafiyar da kyakkyawan aiki na masana'antu da ingantaccen aiki.

products.label: Kayayyakinmu
products.title: Kayayyaki da Kayan Masana'antu
products.description: Binciki kewayon kayayyakin masana'antu masu inganci, daga tsarin sarrafa har zuwa kayan aiki masu daidaici, da aka tsara don mafi kyawun aiki.

clients.label: Abokan Ciniki
clients.title: Amintattun Jagororin Masana'antu da Ƙungiyoyi
clients.description: Mun yi aiki tare da jagororin masana'antu daga fannoni daban-daban don ba da maganganun injiniya na musamman.
clients.testimonialsTitle: Abin da Abokan Ciniki ke Cewa

projects.label: Ayyukanmu
projects.title: Nunin Iyawar Injiniya
projects.description: Duba portfoliyon ayyukan da muka gama a masana'antu daban-daban, wanda ke nuna inganci, ƙwarewa da aminci.

contact.label: Yi Hulda
contact.title: Shirye kuke don Fara Aikinku?
contact.description: Bari mu tattauna yadda ƙwarewarmu ta injiniya za ta iya taimaka muku cimma burinku na sarrafa masana'antu da na'urorin sarrafa.

phone.title: Kira Mu Yau
phone.description: Yi magana kai tsaye da ƙwararrun injiniyoyinmu

seo.title: Catalog na Kayayyakin Masana'antu - Sarrafa da Kayan Lantarki | Powerton Engineering
seo.description: Catalog mai cikakke na kayayyakin sarrafa masana'antu, kayan lantarki, kayan aiki, tsarin hasken rana, famfo da kayan aiki. Kayan aiki masu inganci don amfani na masana'antu.

seo.title: Sabis na Injiniya na Ƙwararru - Shigarwa, Kulawa da Sarrafa | Powerton Engineering
seo.description: Sabis na injiniya na musamman: shirye-shiryen PLC, tsarin SCADA, sarrafa masana'antu, shigar da paneli na lantarki, kulawa, daidaitawa, hanyoyin keɓancewa da sabis na EPC na hasken rana a duk faɗin Indiya.

hero.title: Sabis na Injiniya na Ƙwararru
hero.subtitle: Cikakkun hanyoyin magance na sarrafa masana'antu, injiniyan lantarki da na'urori da aka tsara don inganta ayyukanku da ci gaba na kasuwanci.

whyChoose.title: Me yasa Za ku Zaɓi Powerton Engineering?

expertTeam.title: Ƙungiyar Ƙwararru
expertTeam.description: Ƙwararrun ma'aikata masu takaddun shaida da gogewa mai yawa a fannin

rapidResponse.title: Saurin Amsawa
rapidResponse.description: Matsakaicin lokacin amsawa awa 2 don duk bukatun tallafi

qualityAssured.title: Ingancin da Aka Tabbatar
qualityAssured.description: Tsarin ISO da aka amince da shi da tabbatattun ma'auni na inganci

clientFocused.title: Mayar da Hankali ga Abokin Ciniki

cta.title: Shirye ku don Farawa?
cta.description: Tuntuɓe mu a yau don tattauna bukatun aikinku da samun magani na musamman.

seo.title: Shafin Ba a Samu ba (404) - Powerton Engineering
seo.description: Shafin da kuke nemo babu. Koma shafin farko na Powerton Engineering ko bincika sabis da kayayyakinmu na sarrafa masana'antu.

notFound.heading: Shafin Ba a Samu ba
notFound.message: Yi hakuri, shafin da kuke nemo babu. Wataƙila an motsa shi, an share shi ko kun shigar da URL mara daidai.

hero.title: Tuntuɓi Ƙwararrun Injiniyoyinmu
hero.subtitle: Shirye ku don fara aiki na gaba? Ƙungiyarmu ta ƙwararru a shirye take ta taimaka muku da maganganun injiniya na musamman da shawarwari na ƙwararru.

methods.title: Hanyoyi Daban-daban na Isa Gare Mu
methods.subtitle: Zaɓi hanyar sadarwa da ta fi dacewa da ku. Muna samuwa 24/7 don tallafin gaggawa.

form.title: Aiko mana da Saƙo
form.subtitle: Ku sami hanyar sadarwa da mu don tambayoyi na gaba ɗaya, bayanan sabis, ko tambayoyin fasaha.
